company.name: Merck KGaA, Darmstadt (Healthcare Division)
company.subtitle: Healthcare-only model | EUR 8.6B / $9.6B 2025 (+5%) | Mavenclad MS + Erbitux + SpringWorks acq (Ogsiveo + Gomekli) + Bavencio decline | EXCLUDES Life Science (€10B) + Electronics (€4B)
company.cashRunway: Self-funding (~EUR 4B+ Healthcare op cash flow); group net debt EUR 8.6B post-SpringWorks $3.4B acq 2025

market.notes: Heritage tail (~$1.5B): Euthyrox (levothyroxine ROW thyroid replacement ~€400M), Neurobion (B-vitamin complex ROW), Femara biosim ROW, Erbitux + Bavencio Asia alliance, Other Healthcare revenues. Mature ROW-dominant.

mega_bear.narrative: Bavencio cliff accelerates; Mavenclad growth slows; Tepmetko niche; SpringWorks integration drag
events: X Bavencio -25% 2026 vs Padcev+Keytruda new SoC
X SpringWorks $3.4B acq goodwill impairment risk

bear.narrative: Mavenclad steady; Bavencio managed decline; SpringWorks Ogsiveo ramps; Tepmetko niche steady

base.narrative: Mavenclad $2.5B peak; Ogsiveo + Gomekli SpringWorks franchise $1B; Cladribine MG approved
events: V Ogsiveo desmoid + Gomekli NF1-PN combined $800M+
V Pimicotinib TGCT approved + xevinapant 2L MET salvage

bull.narrative: Mavenclad $3B + SpringWorks $1.5B+ + cladribine MG breakout; xevinapant 2L MET positive
events: V Cladribine MG class share vs FcRn
V SpringWorks combined $1.5B Ogsiveo + Gomekli + pipeline

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Multi-franchise dominance; SpringWorks pipeline expands; full pipeline approved

lastData.title: FY2025 Healthcare ~EUR 8.6B / $9.6B (+5% organic). Group EUR 21.1B. Mavenclad +16.6% growth driver. SpringWorks $3.4B acq 2025 brings Ogsiveo (desmoid) + Gomekli (NF1-PN). Bavencio declining vs Padcev+Keytruda new UC SoC.
points: Mavenclad EUR 1.2B (+16.6%); MS dominant short-course oral
Bavencio ~EUR 700M (-13.8%); UC + MCC + RCC; w/ Pfizer 50/50
Rebif ~EUR 350M (-23%); declining vs new MS DMTs
SpringWorks $3.4B acq 2025: Ogsiveo (desmoid Ph3 DEFI) + Gomekli (NF1-PN approved Feb 2025)
Pimicotinib (CSF-1R TGCT) Ph3 MANEUVER positive 2024; BLA filed 2025
Xevinapant TrilynX 1L LA HNSCC FAILED Mar 2024; XRay Vision 2L salvage continues

nextCatalyst.title: Pimicotinib TGCT PDUFA + Cladribine MG Ph3 + Xevinapant 2L Ph3
thresholds: H1 2026: Pimicotinib TGCT FDA approval (MANEUVER Ph3 positive 2024)
H2 2026: Cladribine MyClad MG Ph3 readout
2027: Xevinapant XRay Vision 2L MET HNSCC Ph3 readout

risks: Bavencio decline: Padcev+Keytruda new UC 1L SoC threatens maintenance
Mavenclad vs newer MS DMTs (Kesimpta SC anti-CD20, Briumvi)
Erbitux mature + biosim threat (Lilly cetuximab biosim approved EU)
Rebif rapid decline vs orals (Mavenclad, Tysabri)
Xevinapant TrilynX 1L FAILED Mar 2024; pipeline credibility hit
Evobrutinib BTKi MS Ph3 FAILED 2023 (Sanofi rilzabrutinib also struggling)
SpringWorks $3.4B acquisition integration + goodwill impairment risk
Tepmetko vs Tabrecta (Novartis) MET class competition
Excludes Life Science Process Solutions + Electronics segments

catalysts.title: Pimicotinib TGCT FDA approval (MANEUVER Ph3 positive 2024)
catalysts._rationale: MANEUVER Ph3 TGCT positive 2024; BLA filed 2025.

catalysts.title: Cladribine MyClad MG Ph3 readout (line extension to MG)
catalysts._rationale: Cladribine immunomodulation supports MG hypothesis; class peers Vyvgart/Ultomiris dominant.

catalysts.title: Xevinapant XRay Vision 2L MET-driven HNSCC Ph3 readout
catalysts._rationale: TrilynX 1L FAILED Mar 2024; salvage Ph3 at lower probability.
